events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles drummer, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Ringo's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Fab Four to his All-Starr Band, his beat is unmistakable. What's your favourite Ringo moment or Beatles track featuring his distinctive drumming?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the legendary Brian May! From stadium-rocking riffs with Queen to his incredible work as an astrophysicist, he truly is a rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' charismatic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: Can you believe Mick Jagger is 83 today? The Rolling Stones legend is still bringing the energy! What's your go-to Stones track to get you moving?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) first launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its inaugural video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever, kicking off with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. The irony isn't lost on us! What was the first music video you remember seeing?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Day
angles.copy: It's been 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and gave us some of the greatest Britpop anthems. Which track from the album still gives you that 'Madchester' feeling?

events.title: Woodstock Festival 57th Anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, opened on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people descended on a farm in New York for three days of peace, love, and music. Happy anniversary to Woodstock! If you could have been there, which artist would you have wanted to see most?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering Elvis Presley, who passed away on this day in 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King of Rock & Roll, Elvis Presley, who left us in 1977. His legacy continues to inspire generations. What's your all-time favourite Elvis song?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering rock guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on this day in 1970.

angles.name: Legendary Guitarist
angles.copy: Today marks the anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing in 1970. His innovative guitar work continues to influence musicians worldwide. What's the Jimi Hendrix track that always blows you away?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Day
angles.copy: 57 years ago, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road', an album that cemented their legendary status with tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes The Sun'. What's your favourite from this iconic record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer and songwriter, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! The Pretenders frontwoman has given us decades of amazing music. What's your favourite track from her iconic career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman and solo artist, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Our Kid's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! From Oasis anthems to his solo hits, he's still a rock 'n' roll star. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 51
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975.

angles.name: Imagine 51 Years
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine', a song that continues to resonate globally with its message of peace and unity. What does this iconic track mean to you?

events.title: First iPod launched 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple introduced the very first iPod on this day in 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music.

angles.name: iPod's 25th
angles.copy: Remember the original iPod? 25 years ago today, Apple launched this game-changer, putting '1,000 songs in your pocket'. How many songs did you cram onto your first iPod?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Today we celebrate 007 and decades of iconic films, thrilling gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes. Which Bond theme is your all-time favourite?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire the world. What's the Lennon song that means the most to you?
